display.name: PlanetScale Vitess (MySQL)
display.description: Track PlanetScale Vitess query rate, latency, pools, MySQL internals, replication lag, VTOrc, storage, and pod resources. Use branch, keyspace, and tablet type filters.

display.name: branch
display.description: Filter panels by PlanetScale database branch (planetscale_database_branch_id).

display.name: keyspace
display.description: Filter vttablet and MySQL panels by Vitess keyspace (planetscale_keyspace).

display.name: tablet_type
display.description: Filter vttablet and MySQL panels by tablet type, such as primary, replica, or rdonly (planetscale_tablet_type).

display.name: InnoDB Buffer Pool Hit %
display.description: Buffer pool hit ratio from (1 - rate(reads) / rate(read_requests)) * 100. Sustained dips point to a working set larger than the buffer pool.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Connection Utilization % by Pod
display.description: Per-pod MySQL connection utilization from threads_connected / max_connections * 100. Use it to find a saturated tablet hidden by fleet totals.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Connection Pool — In Use vs Capacity
display.description: vttablet connection pool usage compared with capacity.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: CPU Utilization by Pod
display.description: CPU utilization by pod.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

display.name: Found Rows Pool — In Use vs Capacity
display.description: vttablet found-rows pool usage compared with capacity.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: InnoDB Row Lock Waits /s
display.description: InnoDB row lock waits per second and lock wait time accrued per second.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: InnoDB Row Operations /s
display.description: InnoDB row operations per second by operation type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Disk IOPS by Pod
display.description: I/O operations per second by pod.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

display.name: Memory Utilization by Pod
display.description: Memory utilization by pod.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

display.name: MySQL Network I/O
display.description: MySQL bytes sent and received per second.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Pool Waits /s
display.description: Waits per second for free connection and transaction pool slots. Sustained non-zero values indicate pool saturation.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Replica Lag by Shard
display.description: MySQL replication lag by shard, in seconds.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace

display.name: Stream Connection Pool — In Use vs Capacity
display.description: vttablet stream connection pool usage compared with capacity.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: MySQL Threads Running
display.description: MySQL threads running queries.

display.name: Transaction Pool — In Use vs Capacity
display.description: vttablet transaction pool usage compared with capacity.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Volume Available vs Capacity
display.description: Available and provisioned vttablet volume bytes.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Volume Used %
display.description: Used vttablet volume percentage from (capacity - available) / capacity * 100.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: MySQL Threads Connected vs Max
display.description: Open MySQL connections compared with max_connections.

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Temp Tables Created /s
display.description: Internal temp tables created per second and temp tables spilled to disk. High disk-table rates point to expensive sorts or joins.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: InnoDB Buffer Pool I/O /s
display.description: Logical buffer pool reads compared with reads that reached disk.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.name: Table Locks /s
display.description: Table locks acquired without waiting compared with locks that waited.

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

display.description: Mean vtgate query execution time from rate(duration.sum) / rate(duration.count).

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

display.description: Query execution time distribution through vtgate.

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

display.description: Queries per second through vtgate by operation type.

display.description: Rows returned and affected per second through vtgate.

display.description: Pod count by Kubernetes status phase. Check non-zero Pending or Failed pods.
